channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA Hall of Famers Tracy McGrady, Vince Carter join Bills' ownership group
item.description: NBA legends Tracy McGrady and Vince Carter are now minority stakeholders of the Buffalo Bills, joining a 10-person ownership group with the Pegula family.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WFLA, NBC

item.title: WNBA and players' union meet to discuss new CBA
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA and the league's players union met in person Wednesday to discuss a new collective bargaining agreement.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: North Carolina announces 5-year deal with Bill Belichick to take over as coach of the Tar Heels
item.description: Bill Belichick had seemingly been waiting for the right opportunity to return to an NFL sideline. Instead, the six-time Super Bowl-winning head coach is headed to the college ranks to take over at North Carolina.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohio politician proposes bill to make flag planting a felony after fight in Michigan rivalry game
item.description: An Ohio politician has seen enough flag planting by visiting sports teams. Republican state Rep. Josh Williams said Wednesday on social media he’s introducing a bill to make flag planting in sports a felony in the state. His proposal comes after the Nov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto gets free luxury suite and up to 4 premium tickets for home games in $765M Mets deal
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Juan Soto gets free use of a luxury suite and up to four premium tickets behind home plate for regular-season and postseason New York Mets home games as part of his record $765 million, 15-year contract that was finalized Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: New Mexico QB Devon Dampier transferring to Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team has found its new starting quarterback. Devon Dampier announced that he is transferring from New Mexico to Utah, and will have two years of eligibility remaining.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lake Placid working with Italian officials as a backup sliding site for 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Lake Placid would play host to bobsled, luge and skeleton events for the 2026 Olympics if a track currently being rebuilt in Italy isn’t finished in time for the Milan-Cortina Games, officials said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bill Belichick agrees to become UNC's next head football coach
item.description: Bill Belichick is the new head coach of the North Carolina Tar Heels, as the university announced they agreed to a deal on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady join Bills' ownership group as limited partners
item.description: IRVING, Texas (AP) — Basketball Hall of Famers Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady are among 10 limited partners who have joined the Buffalo Bills’ ownership group. The noncontrolling, minority interests were approved Wednesday by NFL team owners at the league’s winter meetings.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy says LIV Golf and PGA Tour match is giving back to fans of a divided sport
item.description: Two of the best players each from LIV Golf versus the PGA Tour in a televised match might remind golf fans what they're missing outside of the four majors. Rory McIlroy believes it shows they're at least trying to repair a divided sport.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bowl games miss out on 4 CFP teams, the latest twist and turn for college football's postseason
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Greg McGarity had reason to be concerned. The Gator Bowl president kept a watchful eye on College Football Playoff scenarios all season and understood the fallout might affect his postseason matchup in Jacksonville.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio lawmaker looks to outlaw flag planting at Buckeyes’ stadium after Michigan brawl
item.description: An Ohio state lawmaker is hoping to prevent future brawls at Ohio Stadium after introducing legislation that would ban flag planting at the Buckeyes' field on game day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Basketball: Clairemont 24, Preuss 18
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball in Clairemont with Preuss dribbling against the Chieftains. A low scoring defensive game went the way for the home team with Clairemont winning 24-18.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Point Loma 36, Mar Vista 22
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in Point Loma with the Pointers hosting Mar Vista. Pointers win this one 36-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Bill Belichick considering offer to be UNC Chapel Hill head football coach
item.description: CHAPEL HILL, N.C. (WGHP) — Bill Belichick is in negotiations to potentially become the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill's next head coach. InsideCarolina’s Grant Hughes first reported that Belichick interviewed for the job earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Bill Belichick's known ties to the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
item.description: Belichick, 72, is considered by many to be the greatest NFL head coach of all time and was the architect of the New England Patriots dynasty from 2001-2019.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Top-rated recruit AJ Dybantsa chooses BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The definitive #1 rated basketball recruit in the entire country is coming to BYU. AJ Dybantsa, a 6-foot-9 forward, announced on ESPN Tuesday that he is committing to play basketball for the Cougars starting in the 2025-26 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hall has goal and assist, Soderblom stops 29 shots as Blackhawks beat Rangers 2-1
item.description: Taylor Hall had a goal and an assist, Arvid Soderblom stopped 29 shots and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the New York Rangers 2-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs with Bowles: Bucs finally see first place after a tough battle against Raiders
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers won their third straight game, 28-13, over the Las Vegas Raiders and climbed back into first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC beats Flyers to sweep East Coast road trip
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since the first week of the NHL season, the Utah Hockey Club has won back-to-back games, and they did it on back-to-back nights.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Juan Soto's $765M deal with the Mets is the largest in MLB history. Here's who he passed
item.description: Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed to a record $765 million, 15-year contract Sunday night, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James misses 1st game this season, sidelined versus Portland due to left foot soreness
item.description: LeBron James will sit out Sunday's game against the Portland Trail Blazers due to left foot soreness, the NBA career scoring leader's first missed game of the season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks starting goaltender Petr Mrazek placed on injured reserve with groin injury
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks placed goaltender Petr Mrazek on injured reserve on Sunday with a left groin injury. Mrazek was replaced by Arvid Soderblom in the first period of Saturday's 4-2 loss to Winnipeg. The 32-year-old Mrazek is 7-11-1 with a 2.83 goals-against average and .
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: We only know 1 of the teams in the upcoming Rose Bowl game so far. Here's why
item.description: We now know the matchup of college football's most prestigious event, the Rose Bowl Game, "The Granddaddy of Them All," that will take place on Jan. 1. Well at least we know half of it.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
